Signal technology vs distribution platforms. Distribution has solved access, but access without signal is noise—reinforces resume obsolescence thesis

Behavioral signal (how people think) is more valuable than profile data (what they've done). This challenges the fundamental premise of LinkedIn and traditional resumes
